---
title: "Data Driven Approach for Social Sciences"
---

## Course information

**Course:** Data Driven Approach for Social Sciences  
**Degree programme:** Social Sciences for Global Challenges  
**Department:** Department of Political and Social Sciences, University of Pavia  
**Hours:** 40  
**Period:** October-December

## Course overview

This course introduces students to data-driven approaches for the analysis of social-science problems. It focuses on statistical reasoning, data analysis and computational tools for studying social, economic and institutional phenomena.

The course is designed to help students move from substantive research questions to empirical analysis, with attention to data preparation, exploratory analysis, model interpretation and reproducible workflows.

## Main topics

- Data-driven reasoning in the social sciences
- Data sources, data quality and preprocessing
- Exploratory data analysis
- Statistical models for social-science data
- Interpretation and communication of empirical results
- Reproducible workflows for data analysis

## Course materials

Course materials will be made available during the semester.
